tool_input.command:
git add .caliber/ && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
chore: update Caliber learning state

Auto-generated by Caliber session tracking.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01G5U4Bc1SSdWTeSBbqF3Um9
EOF
)" && git push -u origin claude/update-claude-md-GOKwQ
tool_input.description: Commit and push caliber learning state

tool_response.stdout:
[2mcaliber: refreshing docs...[0m
caliber: no LLM provider configured — run `caliber config` first
[claude/update-claude-md-GOKwQ 178938a] chore: update Caliber learning state
 2 files changed, 11 insertions(+), 6 deletions(-)
To http://127.0.0.1:42757/git/jakeoborn/Appetyt
   8b77e85..178938a  claude/update-claude-md-GOKwQ -> claude/update-claude-md-GOKwQ
branch 'claude/update-claude-md-GOKwQ' set up to track 'origin/claude/update-claude-md-GOKwQ'.

prompt_content: Dim hour and warm copper sounds interesting anything simlair

tool_input.command:
check() {
  local d="$1"
  local r=$(curl -s "https://cloudflare-dns.com/dns-query?name=${d}&type=A" -H "accept: application/dns-json")
  local has_answer=$(echo "$r" | grep -c '"Answer"')
  if [ "$has_answer" -gt 0 ]; then echo "$d: TAKEN"; else echo "$d: possibly open"; fi
}
for n in \
  amberhour quiethour slowhour stillhour lonhour lasthour deephour hushhour softhour lowhour duskhour afterhour \
  ambertable ambermenu amberlight amberroom amberplate amberhouse \
  duskplate dusktable duskmenu duskhouse dusklight \
  dimlight dimtable dimplate dimmenu dimroom dimwindow dimservice dimcandle \
  lowlight softlight warmlight slowlight candlelight lamplight tablelight \
  candlehour lamphour hearthhour emberhour cinderhour salthour breadhour oakhour \
  hearthtable hearthlight hearthnote hearthroom hearthhouse \
  embertable embermenu emberroom emberhouse emberplate \
  warmbrass warmbronze warmpewter warmoak warmstone warmroom warmcorner warmbooth warmharbor warmlamp warmhour warmplate \
  oldcopper darkcopper softcopper slowcopper brightcopper deepcopper copperlamp copperpot copperkettle coppernight \
  brasshour brassfork brasstable brasslamp brassplate \
  pewtertable slatetable oakhour oaktable linenhour velvethour silkhour \
  hushhour hushlight hushtable hushroom \
  longhour stillplate stillhour stilltable \
  darkhour dimhourly; do
  check "${n}.com"
done

tool_input.command:
check() {
  local d="$1"
  local r=$(curl -s "https://cloudflare-dns.com/dns-query?name=${d}&type=A" -H "accept: application/dns-json")
  local has_answer=$(echo "$r" | grep -c '"Answer"')
  if [ "$has_answer" -gt 0 ]; then echo "$d: TAKEN"; else echo "$d: possibly open"; fi
}
# Double-meaning candidates: word works in food + another context
for d in \
  wordofmouth.com wordofmouth.app \

done
